title: genista carpetana subsp. carpetana
intro: Genista carpetana subsp. carpetana, also known as the Spanish broom or Spanish gorse, is a shrub that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have a positive impact on cardiovascular health and digestion. The health benefits of Genista carpetana subsp. carpetana include its ability to help lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Genista carpetana subsp. carpetana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
